coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 1,748-node root closure and its 256-case Marching Cubes lookup table.
validation: The pre-SDF realized source matches Blender at 9,508 vertices, 9,508 faces, and bounds within 0.0001 units. The final silhouette and four outward spikes visually match. Final vertices differ by 4.26%, faces by 8.93%, and the remaining point-based Mesh-to-SDF sampling shortens the final X bounds by up to 0.5589 units.
